commercial.global_donation_desc: Configure the site-wide default donation links used when an author does not provide their own.
commercial.global_social_desc: Configure the site-wide default social links used when an author does not provide their own.
commercial.global_toggle_desc: Enable or disable site-wide sponsorship and donation features. When enabled, sponsor buttons follow the author-specific or global configuration.

agreements.activate_failed: Failed to activate the target version
agreements.activate_requires_approval: Only reviewed authoritative versions can be activated
agreements.aggregated_view_help: Aggregated view merges versions by authoritative source and prefers the translation for the current interface language.
agreements.ai_draft_failed: Failed to create the AI draft
agreements.ai_draft_success: AI draft created. Please continue with manual review.
agreements.approve_success: Marked as a reviewed version that can be activated
agreements.authoritative_help: When the current language matches the authoritative language, you can save and then manually switch it to the active version in the list.
agreements.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this agreement version? This cannot be undone.
agreements.description: Manage user agreements and privacy policies with authoritative versions, active versions, and reference translation governance.
agreements.flat_view_help: The full list expands all languages and versions so you can edit, switch, and inspect them one by one.
agreements.language_help: Authoritative language versions can be activated directly; other languages are shown as reference translations.
agreements.load_failed: Failed to load the agreement list

restrictions.active_authoritative: The currently active authoritative version cannot be edited or deleted. Please create a new version and switch activation to it.
restrictions.consented: A version that already has user consent cannot be edited or deleted.
restrictions.env_locked: An agreement injected through environment variables cannot be edited or deleted.

agreements.review_status_failed: Failed to update the review status
agreements.source_version_help: The reference translation follows the authoritative version selected here.
agreements.source_version_placeholder: Select the authoritative version for this translation
agreements.title: Agreement management

ai_editor.advanced_json_description: Edit this only when you need to maintain special rules such as user, trust_level, or type:* entries. The content must be a policy array.
ai_editor.alerts_description: The first release supports usage-rate, cost-rate, and failure-burst alerts, which is enough to close the minimal governance loop first.
ai_editor.basic_policy_help: Unset limit fields are treated as unlimited.
ai_editor.basic_quota_description: Prioritize the most common global and role quota rules here so daily operations can maintain them directly.
ai_editor.basic_quota_empty: There are no basic policies yet. You can start by adding a global daily quota rule.
ai_editor.cny_exchange_rate: CNY to display currency exchange rate
ai_editor.cost_mapping_description: Map quota units to the unified currency cost used by backend audits while still accommodating provider-specific raw pricing conversions.
ai_editor.cost_mapping_hint: Display cost defaults to "quota units × unit price". If the provider's converted raw price is higher, the higher value is used to avoid undercounting.
ai_editor.failure_burst_description: Triggered when failures rise rapidly in a short window, helping detect model, provider, or task-pipeline anomalies.
ai_editor.invalid_advanced_json: Advanced JSON must be a valid policy array. Please fix the format before saving.
ai_editor.invalid_alert_json: The current alert-threshold JSON cannot be parsed. Switched to raw edit mode; please fix the format first.
ai_editor.invalid_cost_json: The current cost-mapping JSON cannot be parsed. Switched to raw edit mode; please fix the format first.
ai_editor.invalid_quota_json: The current quota-policy JSON cannot be parsed. Switched to raw edit mode; please fix the format first.
ai_editor.usd_exchange_rate: USD to display currency exchange rate

audit_logs.description: Records the history of database configuration changes by administrators and indicates whether they are currently active from the database.
audit_logs.title: Config Change Audit Logs

demo_preview.description: The current page is showing anonymized demo data to illustrate system capabilities. Reading is switched to secure preview data; operations like save or delete will still be intercepted.
demo_preview.title: Demo Mode Sample Data

floating_actions.leave_confirm: You have unsaved changes on this page. Are you sure you want to leave?

fields.external_feed_home_enabled: Show external updates on the homepage

hints.ai_alert_thresholds_description: Configure threshold alerts for quota usage, cost usage, and short-window failure bursts via the form.
hints.ai_cost_factors_description: Uniform AI cost reporting is configured via quota unit prices and exchange rates; currently uses the higher of the mapped quota and provider quote by default.
hints.ai_quota_policies_description: Prioritize basic editor for global and role policies; special rules for user, trust_level, and type:* can be added in Advanced JSON.
hints.asr_credential_ttl_seconds: Controls the default lifetime for direct real-time ASR credentials. Supports values like 600, 10m, or 15m, and is automatically clamped to the provider-safe range.
hints.audio_upload_size_value: Separate larger limits for audio are recommended. Supports formats like 100MiB, 256MB.
hints.comment_interval: Minimum time between comments. Supports human-readable durations like 30s, 5m, or 1h and still accepts legacy numeric seconds.
hints.email_daily_limit: Limit the total number of emails site-wide within the statistical window.
hints.email_limit_window: Time window used to count outgoing emails. Supports human-readable durations like 15m or 1d and still accepts legacy numeric seconds.
hints.email_single_user_daily_limit: Limit the number of emails a single mailbox can receive within the statistical window.
hints.env_locked: This configuration is locked by an environment variable
hints.external_feed_cache_ttl_seconds: Controls how long a successful external source fetch can be reused from cache. Supports human-readable durations like 15m or 1d and still accepts legacy numeric seconds.
hints.external_feed_home_limit: Controls how many aggregated external updates can appear in the homepage module.
hints.external_feed_sources: Provide a JSON array of external sources. Each item must include at least id, provider, title, and sourceUrl, and can optionally define includeInHome, defaultLocale, localeStrategy, priority, cacheTtlSeconds, staleWhileErrorSeconds, and maxItems.
hints.external_feed_stale_while_error_seconds: Controls how long the latest successful snapshot may continue to be used when refreshing an external source fails. Supports human-readable durations like 15m or 1d and still accepts legacy numeric seconds.
hints.feedback_url: Used for "Contact Administrator" entries on public feedback pages. Can be a ticket URL, form URL, or mailto link; falls back to contact email if empty.
hints.footer_code: Appended to the bottom of the site footer, supports HTML snippets.
hints.friend_links_application_guidelines: Displayed at the top of the public friend link application page. Supports multi-line text for admission criteria and exchange requirements.
hints.friend_links_check_interval_minutes: Minimum interval between friend link availability checks. Supports human-readable durations like 2h or 1d and still accepts legacy numeric minutes.
hints.friend_links_footer_limit: Controls the maximum number of featured friend links displayed in the footer area.
hints.keywords_placeholder: One keyword per line. Matching comments will automatically be flagged for review or as spam.
hints.listmonk_access_token: API Access Token generated in the listmonk admin panel
hints.listmonk_default_list_ids: e.g., 1,2,5; used if no mapping matches
hints.listmonk_template_id: Optional Listmonk template ID; leaves Campaign content as is if empty
hints.local_storage_min_free_space: System will refuse further uploads when disk free space falls below this threshold. Unit: bytes.
hints.memos_access_token: Generate via Memos Settings -> Account -> Access Tokens
hints.post_copyright: Default copyright agreement only for article pages and external distribution; does not affect site footer copyright.
hints.posts_per_page: Default pagination value for articles, archives, etc., when no explicit limit is provided.
hints.site_copyright_owner: Used for site copyright display. Falls back to operator, then site title if empty.
hints.site_copyright_start_year: Shows only the current year if empty; providing a 4-digit start year shows a range if the current year is later.
hints.site_name: Used as a fallback for SEO, email, etc., when the site title is empty.
hints.travellings_footer_enabled: Controls whether the 'Travellings' link appears in the site-wide footer navigation.
hints.travellings_header_enabled: Controls whether the 'Travellings' link appears in the desktop header and mobile navigation drawer.
hints.travellings_sidebar_enabled: Controls whether the 'Travellings' link appears in the article details sidebar.
hints.upload_daily_limit: Limit the total number of uploads site-wide within the statistical window.
hints.upload_limit_window: Time window used to count uploads. Supports human-readable durations like 15m or 1d and still accepts legacy numeric seconds.
hints.upload_single_user_daily_limit: Limit the number of uploads a single user can perform within the statistical window.

keys.ai_image_description: Configure models used for generating post covers and illustrations
keys.ai_quota_description: Configure requests, quota units, cost, and heavy task concurrency limits across global, role, and user tiers.
keys.ai_tts_description: Configure cloud-based text-to-speech services for article audio, podcasts, etc.
keys.canvas_nest_data_saver_block: Disable CanvasNest automatically on data saver/slow networks
keys.effects_data_saver_block: Disable visual effects automatically on data saver/slow networks
keys.friend_links_footer_enabled: Show featured friend links in footer
keys.live2d_data_saver_block: Disable Live2D automatically on data saver/slow networks

localized.env_override_legacy_description: {envKey} is currently providing a single string value, so all languages will share this content. To enable true multilingual support, remove this environment variable and save from the backend, or change it to a structured multilingual JSON.
localized.env_override_legacy_title: Currently managed by ENV in legacy single-value format
localized.env_override_structured_description: {envKey} is currently providing a structured multilingual JSON. The backend editor is read-only preview; to modify locale content, update the environment variable directly.
localized.helper: Maintain separately by locale; the public page uses a unified fallback chain.
localized.keywords_description: Maintain SEO keywords by locale. Public APIs will still output a comma-separated string, though internally stored as a list.
localized.legacy_description: This field previously stored one copy of content for the entire site. After saving by locale for the first time, it will migrate to a structured multilingual format; the old value will only serve as a compatibility fallback.
localized.missing_translation: {locale} is not yet filled out and will use available content from {fallbackChain} per the fallback chain; if the entire chain is missing, it will continue to attempt legacy compatibility.
localized.string_list_hint: Use commas to separate keywords; saved as a list structure for the current locale.
localized.text_hint: If the current locale is empty, content from other languages will not be copied automatically; instead, it's processed via the unified fallback chain.

system.locked_by_env: This configuration is enforced by an environment variable and cannot be modified manually.

delivery_logs.description: Track notification delivery by type, channel, result, and time window to ensure trace-ability of sent user notifications.
delivery_logs.title: Notification Delivery Audit

notifications.description: Configure administrator preferences for specific site events. Timely notifications help you respond quickly to user interactions and system anomalies.
notifications.title: Site Notification Config

web_push.description: Site browser notifications rely on VAPID Subject, Public Key, and a Private Key configured only in server environment variables. Maintain the public Subject and Key here, and view if the Private Key is ready in ENV.
web_push.private_key_hint: The VAPID private key is only supported via injection through the WEB_PUSH_VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY environment variable. You can use pnpm web-push:generate-vapid to generate the full set.
web_push.public_key_hint: Provide the VAPID Public Key for browser subscriptions.
web_push.subject_hint: Recommended contact address starting with mailto:, e.g., mailto:admin{'@'}example.com.
web_push.title: Web Push Basic Config

external_feeds.refresh_cache_hint: After updating source settings, you can pull the latest RSS / RSSHub snapshots immediately.
external_feeds.refresh_cache_failed: Failed to refresh external feed cache.

setup_follow_up.description: The installation wizard has completed the minimal configuration. Before continuing to the editor to experience the full creation flow, it is recommended to complete account verification, notifications, AI, and storage policies.

ai.description: Check models, quotas, and cost display to ensure a consistent creation experience.
ai.title: AI Services

auth.description: Confirm registration policies, CAPTCHA, and the first administrator recovery path.
auth.title: Account Verification

notifications.description: Complete browser push and administrator notifications to avoid silent critical events.
notifications.title: Admin Notifications

storage.description: Confirm upload directories, object storage, and capacity thresholds to avoid future blocks.
storage.title: File Storage

setup_follow_up.title: Initial Setup Recommendations

smart_mode.description: System configuration resolves across ENV, Database, and Default tiers. The top only keeps overview stats; specific field sources are explained directly next to inputs.

messages.default_used: Not explicitly configured; using default value.
messages.env_override: Managed by environment variable {envKey}; changes here won't take immediate effect.
messages.forced_env_lock: Read-only boot configuration; requires ENV adjustment and service restart.
messages.restart_required: Stored in database; requires a service restart to fully apply.

smart_mode.title: Smart Hybrid Mode

system.title: System Settings

theme.apply_success: Theme scheme applied successfully across the site
theme.color_reset_hint: Leave empty to use pre-built theme defaults
theme.custom_hint: In custom mode, you can save any manual color and detail adjustments.
theme.gallery_empty: The gallery is empty; go save your own exclusive scheme!
theme.gallery_fetch_error: Failed to fetch theme gallery list
theme.mourning_mode_hint: When enabled, the site turns grayscale; suitable for special memorial days.
theme.previewing_hint: Currently in a temporary preview mode; click cancel to restore original settings.
theme.save_preset_hint: A new scheme will capture all current color, radius, and background settings.
theme.title: Theme Customization
